text: - Radius - 5 Miles 10 Miles 25 Miles 50 Miles 100 Miles Search by Provider Name > New Search > Education > Continuing Education 2 Matching Service Providers The mapped locations are estimates, for the exact location of an individual site, select "More Details" Accessibility Options - Select - No Filter Wheelchair Access (Full) Wheelchair Access (Partial) Accessible Parking (Private Lot) Accessible Parking (Nearby Public/Street Parking) Accessible Restrooms Alternative Communication Formats Virtual Service Options Staff Trained in Disability Awareness Print & Share All Results X Print & Share Print PDF CENTER 50+ WELLNESS ON WHEELS VAN Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides front porch visits and mobile wellness services including fitness, information and referral for food resources, activities, lifelong learning instruction, social check-ins, technology tutoring, and mobility and wellness programming. 2615 Portland Road NE Salem, OR 97301 Eligibility: Age 50 and older, who have limited access to programs, activities, and services and want to remain connected to others Hours: Monday-Friday by appointment only Email (503) 588-6303 Get Directions Visit Website More Details LA PINE PARKS AND RECREATION ADULT PROGRAMS Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides education, recreation, health, and business programs. 16405 First Street La Pine, OR 97739 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Monday-Thursday 10am-2pm Email (541) 536-2223 Get Directions Visit Website More Details CENTER 50+ WELLNESS ON WHEELS VAN LA PINE PARKS AND RECREATION ADULT PROGRAMS
